rationale: Substantial Phase-10 Go DDD implementation across 14 files / +2892 lines covering six advanced AI services as the PR body describes. `internal/domain/ai/entity_advanced.go` defines all six entity sets (`CommAgent` + `CommAgentSession` with mode/system-prompt/max-turns/transcript, `VoiceProfile` with pending→training→ready/failed lifecycle, `ConversationAnalysisTask` with four analysis types, `TrainingCourse` + `TrainingExam` + `SimulatedCall`, `RingAnalysisConfig` + `RingAnalysisLog`, `FullDuplexConfig` with 0-1 interruption sensitivity validation). `repository_advanced.go` declares the repository interfaces; `mock_repo_advanced.go` provides in-memory test doubles. `service_advanced.go` contains the application orchestration; `service_advanced_test.go` carries the 18 new TDD tests (5 CommAgent, 3 voice cloning, 3 analytics, 4 training, 1 ring analysis, 2 full-duplex). `internal/infrastructure/llm/advanced_provider.go` declares the six provider interfaces and `stub_advanced_provider.go` provides pluggable stubs. `internal/infrastructure/mysql/advanced_ai_repo.go` implements the MySQL repos with compile-time interface checks. `internal/interfaces/http/handler/advanced_ai.go` and `router.go` wire the 30+ new endpoints under `/tenants/{tenantID}/`. `migrations/000003_advanced_ai.up.sql` and `.down.sql` create/drop the 10 new tables. `cmd/server/main.go` wires the services into the application bootstrap. No tests stripped, no error-swallowing, no cheat patterns.
